metadata.description: World Moms for Claude Code — 10 cultures of mom nagging you to drink water, eat food, and sit up straight.

plugins.name: moooom
plugins.description: Summon moms from 10 cultures (TR, US, UK, MX, DE, IT, ES, KR, JP, GR) to nag you with love — break reminders, food alerts, bug comfort, and coding wisdom.
